ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_type" INTEGER /* Type of the project (e.g., desktop, font) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the project's website or repository */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "package_stats" INTEGER /* Package statistics (e.g., number of downloads, stars) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was last updated */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the project is released */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the project's repository */,
  "maintainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the main maintainer of the project */,
  "stars" INTEGER /* Number of stars the project has received */,
  "forks" INTEGER /* Number of forks the project has */,
  "issues" INTEGER /* Number of open issues in the project */,
  "pull_requests" INTEGER /* Number of open pull requests in the project */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the last activity (commit, issue, pull request) in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_type FOREIGN KEY ("project_type") REFERENCES project_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_maintainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintainer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the project type (e.g., desktop, font) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "contributor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the contributor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contributor */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the contributor is contributing to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the contributor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the contributor record was last updated */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., code, documentation, testing) */,
  "contribution_count" INTEGER /* Number of contributions the user has made to the project */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the contributor joined the project */,
  "last_contribution_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last contribution */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the contributor is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributors_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the release belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the release */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the release was published */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Release notes for the release */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the release was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the release was last updated */,
  "released_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who released the project */,
  "download_url" TEXT /* URL where the release can be downloaded */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Tag name associated with the release */,
  "is_latest" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the release is the latest version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog for the release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_released_by FOREIGN KEY ("released_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "dependent_project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project that depends on another project */,
  "required_project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project that is required by another project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dependency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dependency was last updated */,
  "dependency_version" TEXT /* Version of the required project */,
  "required_minimum_version" TEXT /* Minimum version of the required project */,
  "required_maximum_version" TEXT /* Maximum version of the required project */,
  "is_optional" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the dependency is optional */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_required_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("required_project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_dependent_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being downloaded */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the project has been downloaded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the download count was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the download event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the download event was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who downloaded the project */,
  "download_type" TEXT /* Type of download (e.g., source code, binary) */,
  "download_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the download was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downloads_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., maintainer, contributor, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "last_activity_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last activity (e.g., project view, contribution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
